decision.summary: The daily BTC $78k reach position is already essentially resolved in our favor, and there is no cleaner new edge to add this cycle.
decision.rationale: The latest Beecthor thesis still supports short-term upside into the 78k-79k area, and Binance/Polymarket execution reality now shows that the daily 78k April 17 market has effectively already played out: the existing open daily Yes position is marked around 99.95% probability, which means the thesis has already been expressed successfully. Under the playbook, take profit is considered from 90-95%, but when resolution is near-certain and the outcome is obvious, the position may be held to resolve naturally. That exception applies here. There is no valid reason to open another daily because the daily slot is occupied, and although the weekly slot is technically free, the remaining weekly upside choices are too late in the period and too ambitious relative to Beecthor's main 78k-79k target zone. The correct action this cycle is to hold the near-resolved daily winner and avoid forcing any new trade.
